hooks.command: echo '{"message": "Cure Consulting Group ProductEngineeringSkills plugin loaded. 24 skills available. Use /cure:sdlc, /cure:feature-audit, /cure:security-review, etc."}'

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.kt|*.java) echo '{"reminder": "Android file modified. Consider running /cure:feature-audit and /cure:testing-strategy if feature is complete."}' ;; *.swift) echo '{"reminder": "iOS file modified. Consider running /cure:feature-audit and /cure:testing-strategy if feature is complete."}' ;; *.tsx|*.ts|*.jsx|*.js) echo '{"reminder": "Web file modified. Consider running /cure:feature-audit and /cure:testing-strategy if feature is complete."}' ;; */functions/*|*/firestore*) echo '{"reminder": "Firebase file modified. Consider running /cure:security-review for security rules and /cure:firebase-architect for schema validation."}' ;; esac; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify .env files directly. Use environment variable management.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *-lock.json|*-lock.yaml|*.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files should only be modified by package managers, not manually.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf /*'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive system-wide delete prevented.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *'--force'*push*main*|*'--force'*push*master*) echo 'BLOCKED: Force push to main/master is not allowed. Use a feature branch.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *'drop table'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'drop database'*|*'DROP DATABASE'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive database operations require manual confirmation outside Claude.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0
